summary: Phase 3 Socket.IO bug-fix verification: all 14 tests passed. Handshake works on both localhost:8001 and public preview URL at /api/socket.io/. Old /socket.io/ returns 404. E2E via python-socketio.AsyncClient confirmed: two clients connect with JWT auth, thread:join → REST POST message → Client A receives message:new; POST /read → Client B receives message:read; typing event delivered. Unauth/invalid-token connections properly rejected. All REST regressions (health, openapi 64+ endpoints, feed, search, categories, listings, threads/me, thread dedup) pass.
critical_code_review_comments: socket_service.py: comment on line 19 still says 'mount at /socket.io' but path is /api/socket.io — cosmetic, update comment.

Test file needed -o 'addopts=' to override backend/pytest.ini xdist parallel run because dev-mode OTP is per-phone rate-limited; consider marking OTP-dependent tests with a serial marker or scoping fixtures better for parallel runs.
test_credentials: dev-mode OTP: phones 9877700001 / 9877700002; dev_otp returned in /api/v1/auth/otp/send response
seed_data_creation: Two test users TEST_UserA/TEST_UserB created via OTP dev flow; a direct chat thread created between them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_phase3_socketio.py -v --asyncio-mode=auto -o 'addopts='  (override needed to disable xdist parallel because OTP flow can't be reused across parallel workers). Socket.IO path is /api/socket.io (mounted at same). Frontend socket.js uses path='/api/socket.io'.
rca of the issue: Original bug: python-socketio ASGIApp was mounted at default /socket.io/ but K8s ingress only routes /api/* to backend, so public URL /socket.io/ hit the SPA. Fix (verified): socket_asgi = ASGIApp(sio, socketio_path='/api/socket.io'); app.mount('/api/socket.io', socket_asgi); frontend io(url, {path:'/api/socket.io'}). Both localhost and public preview now return Engine.IO handshakes starting with '0{"sid":' and end-to-end socket flows work.
